task_completion.description: Navigate to the Incident Request form customization or Additional Fields settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus admin or settings page for customizing the Incident Request form or managing Additional Fields is visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the field label and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field creation or edit dialog is open with 'Affected Network Segment' entered in the Label input and 'Network VLAN segment affected by this incident' entered in the Description input.

task_completion.description: Select the Pick List (Single Select) field type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field type dropdown or selection is set to 'Pick List', 'Single Select', or an equivalent dropdown list option.

task_completion.description: Ensure the field is not set as mandatory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mandatory' or 'Require this field' checkbox/toggle is visible and is NOT checked or is set to 'No'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified pick list values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The options/values list for the new field contains exactly: VLAN-10-Corporate, VLAN-20-Guest, VLAN-30-VoIP, VLAN-40-Servers, and VLAN-50-DMZ.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the new field is added to the form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The new field 'Affected Network Segment' is visible in the list of configured additional fields or successfully placed on the Incident Request form canvas.

integrity.description: Agent used the ServiceDesk Plus GUI to create the field
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web interface (clicking buttons, typing in web forms) rather than using a terminal, API scripts, or developer console commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual ServiceDesk Plus application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches ServiceDesk Plus, with proper navigation menus and styling, not a generic text editor or a mocked-up HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply paste the task requirements into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The values and labels are entered into their respective configuration fields within the application's form builder, not just written out in a notepad or chat window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Field Label must be exactly 'Affected Network Segment'. Field Type must be a single-select dropdown (indicators: picklist, dropdown, select). Mandatory must be False (unchecked/No). Pick List Values must exactly include: 'VLAN-10-Corporate', 'VLAN-20-Guest', 'VLAN-30-VoIP', 'VLAN-40-Servers', and 'VLAN-50-DMZ'. Description must be 'Network VLAN segment affected by this incident'.
